items.claim: Nikita Krylov scores high DraftKings points in fights that he wins.
items.quote: He scores really, really well in fights that he's winning. Almost always over 100 DraftKings points.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has more power than Robert Whittaker.
items.quote: More power, bigger man, used to fighting bigger men.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is in his final career stage.
items.quote: Robert Whitaker, this might be the last stance, right?

items.claim: Caesar Almeida is too old to be a good play.
Conor McGregor is too old to be a good play.
Cody Deran is taking the fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Deran taking the fight on short notice

items.claim: There is a wide grappling gap between John Garza and Fared Basharat.
items.quote: The grappling gap between him and Basharat's going to be pretty wide.

items.claim: Elijah Ellison scored only 1.6 DraftKings points in his last fight.
items.quote: last time he fought, he scored 1.6 points.
